'''fadhozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foddering|foddering]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foddering|foddering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fadhozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædhezeth|fædhezeth]] || [[word:fædhezej|fædhezej]] || [[word:fædhezesh|fædhezesh]] || [[word:fædheze|fædheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhodhozoth|fadhodhozoth]] || [[word:fadhodhozoj|fadhodhozoj]] || [[word:fadhodhozosh|fadhodhozosh]] || [[word:fadhodhozo|fadhodhozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhozoth|fadhozoth]] || [[word:fadhozoj|fadhozoj]] || [[word:fadhozosh|fadhozosh]] || [[word:fadhozo|fadhozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhofzoth|fadhofzoth]] || [[word:fadhofzoj|fadhofzoj]] || [[word:fadhofzosh|fadhofzosh]] || [[word:fadhofzof|fadhofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadhozotho|fadhozotho]] || [[word:fadhozojo|fadhozojo]] || [[word:fadhozosho|fadhozosho]] || [[word:fadhozoko|fadhozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadhozoth|fadhozoth]] || [[word:fadhozoj|fadhozoj]] || [[word:fadhozosh|fadhozosh]] || [[word:fadhozo|fadhozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadhozothol|fadhozothol]] || [[word:fadhozojol|fadhozojol]] || [[word:fadhozoshol|fadhozoshol]] || [[word:fadhozokol|fadhozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadhozothotho|fadhozothotho]] || [[word:fadhozojojo|fadhozojojo]] || [[word:fadhozoshosho|fadhozoshosho]] || [[word:fadhozoko|fadhozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadhozothon|fadhozothon]] || [[word:fadhozojon|fadhozojon]] || [[word:fadhozoshon|fadhozoshon]] || [[word:fadhozokon|fadhozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadhozothoro|fadhozothoro]] || [[word:fadhozojoro|fadhozojoro]] || [[word:fadhozoshoro|fadhozoshoro]] || [[word:fadhozokoro|fadhozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
